title: King of the Nether
description: Redesigns the creatures of the Nether under the banner of the true King of the Nether, The Wither. (Requires EMF/ETF or OptiFine)
body:
![The Wither](https://github.com/SkarMC/projectS/blob/main/witherboss.gif?raw=true)
![About: Resource pack created for the Mob Overhaul Season 1 Jam. Redesigns the Wither boss to take his place as the one true king of the Nether. Requires OptiFine or any other mod that supports custom entity models to function. - Skar](https://github.com/SkarMC/projectS/blob/main/desc.png?raw=true)
![Fresh Animations Extension](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/89bc6aa1f13e1dbd4c90e774be73b7f663059fdd.png)
